tasks.subject: Task 0: SEAT_HUES slot palette + slot-indexed playerCardModel + updated unit suite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the collision-prone djb2-hash hue with a frozen 8-entry SEAT_HUES palette indexed by the player's seat slot; everything else byte-identical; 7.5's OWN unit suite tracks the new contract via TDD.

**Files:**
- Modify: public/js/ui/red-carpet.js (add frozen SEAT_HUES export; playerCardModel reads opts.slot → accentHue = SEAT_HUES[((slot%8)+8)%8]; emoji + everything else byte-identical)
- Modify: client-tests/red-carpet.test.js (7.5's OWN unit suite — legitimately tracks the model contract change; NOT the sacrosanct guard)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- SEAT_HUES exported & Object.isFrozen; length 8; every entry Number.isInteger in [0,359]; pairwise-distinct
- playerCardModel(player,{myPlayerId,slot}) → accentHue = SEAT_HUES[safe(slot)]; slots 0..7 → 8 distinct hues; defensive non-finite/negative/non-integer/absent slot (never throws, in-range)
- colour reads ZERO identity (two identities same slot → same hue); stableId on input never changes any field (sentinel)
- name/isHost/isYou/isBot/wins/accentEmoji/label byte-identical to 7.5; accentEmoji still ACCENT_EMOJI[djb2(name+':'+id)%12]; diffArrivals/rollCameraLabel/marqueeSegments unchanged
- npx jest client-tests/red-carpet.test.js green; full npx jest green & additive, zero pre-existing-suite regression

**Verify:** cd C:/mm-phase7-5-1 && npx jest client-tests/red-carpet.test.js ; then cd C:/mm-phase7-5-1 && npx jest

**Steps:** TDD — rewrite red-carpet.test.js (keep diffArrivals/rollCameraLabel/marqueeSegments verbatim; add SEAT_HUES describe; rework playerCardModel block: slot→palette, 8 distinct, zero-identity, defensive, emoji-unchanged, sentinel, label/derivation byte-identical) → verify FAIL (SEAT_HUES undefined) → add `export const SEAT_HUES = Object.freeze([350,25,45,140,188,220,270,312])` after ACCENT_EMOJI + replace the 3 hash-accent lines in playerCardModel with the defensive double-modulo slot index (emoji line unchanged) → verify PASS → full suite → branch-verify (git -C C:/mm-phase7-5-1 branch --show-current == phase7-5-1-seat-table-redesign) → commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/red-carpet.js", "client-tests/red-carpet.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-5-1 && npx jest client-tests/red-carpet.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SEAT_HUES exported frozen; length 8; all int 0-359; pairwise-distinct", "playerCardModel(player,{myPlayerId,slot}) accentHue = SEAT_HUES[((slot%8)+8)%8]; slots 0..7 -> 8 distinct; defensive non-finite/negative/non-integer/absent slot never throws", "colour zero-identity (different identities same slot -> same hue); stableId never affects output (sentinel)", "name/isHost/isYou/isBot/wins/accentEmoji/label byte-identical to 7.5; emoji still djb2(name+':'+id)%12; diffArrivals/rollCameraLabel/marqueeSegments unchanged", "client-tests/red-carpet.test.js green; full npx jest green & additive over post-#31 54/426; zero pre-existing-suite regression"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: slot glue (ui-render.js) + additive .lobby-stage wrapper (index.html) + new jsdom suite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Thread the seat slot from renderLobby into the model, add the ONE structural wrapper, and pin the colour-fix + structure with a new jsdom suite — the sacrosanct guards stay UNEDITED & byte-green.

**Files:**
- Modify: public/js/ui/ui-render.js (gameState.players.forEach((p,slot)=>...) + playerCardModel(p,{myPlayerId,slot}); WHY comment; nothing else)
- Modify: public/index.html (#waiting-room: ONE additive <div class="lobby-stage"> wrapping the existing .players-list-container + .director-panel; ALL ids preserved; .panel-header stays above; #team-screen untouched)
- Create: client-tests/red-carpet-seat-table.test.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- renderLobby passes slot = 0-based render index (host = players[0] = seat 0)
- index.html: single .lobby-stage wraps the existing .players-list-container + .director-panel; all ids preserved; #team-screen untouched
- new suite: 8-player render → 8 DISTINCT --card-accent; host tile --card-accent == String(SEAT_HUES[0]); .lobby-stage contains both .players-list-container and .director-panel; team-mode → 0 #lobby-players li.entrance-card
- render-lobby.test.js + red-carpet-render.test.js UNEDITED & byte-green; full npx jest green & additive (suite count +1, zero pre-existing regression)

**Verify:** cd C:/mm-phase7-5-1 && npx jest client-tests/red-carpet-seat-table.test.js client-tests/red-carpet-render.test.js client-tests/render-lobby.test.js ; then cd C:/mm-phase7-5-1 && npx jest

**Steps:** TDD — write red-carpet-seat-table.test.js (8 distinct accents / host=SEAT_HUES[0] / .lobby-stage wraps both / team early-return) → verify FAIL (.lobby-stage null) → ui-render.js forEach((p,slot)=>...) + playerCardModel(p,{myPlayerId,slot}) (+WHY) ; index.html Edit 1 (open .lobby-stage before .players-list-container) + Edit 2 (close it after .director-panel, before #waiting-room close, anchored by the unique TEAM ASSIGNMENT comment) → verify new suite + the two UNEDITED guards green (git status: render-lobby.test.js / red-carpet-render.test.js NOT modified) → full suite → branch-verify → commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/ui-render.js", "public/index.html", "client-tests/red-carpet-seat-table.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-5-1 && npx jest client-tests/red-carpet-seat-table.test.js client-tests/red-carpet-render.test.js client-tests/render-lobby.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ui-render.js threads slot = 0-based render index into playerCardModel (host = seat 0); only glue change; <li>/container/label/.bot-badge/.btn-kick condition+emit byte-identical", "index.html: ONE additive .lobby-stage wraps the existing .players-list-container + .director-panel; ALL ids preserved; .panel-header above it; #team-screen untouched", "client-tests/red-carpet-seat-table.test.js green: 8-player → 8 distinct --card-accent; host --card-accent == String(SEAT_HUES[0]); .lobby-stage contains both; team-mode → 0 entrance cards", "render-lobby.test.js + red-carpet-render.test.js UNEDITED (git status clean for them) & byte-green", "full npx jest green & additive (suite count +1), zero pre-existing-suite regression"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Seat-Table CSS — Director sidebar + responsive tile grid + mobile stack
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rework 7.5's OWN entrance-card rules into vertical seat tiles and append the .lobby-stage layout (desktop sidebar+grid, mobile stack, id-anchored panel widen) — NO pre-7.5 rule edited; cardEntrance + global reduced-motion reused unchanged.

**Files:**
- Modify: public/css/02-hero-lobby.css (rework 7.5's OWN rules at lines 765–777 into tile form; append a PHASE 7.5.1 SEAT-TABLE LAYOUT subsection at EOF after ~line 893)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Desktop ≥768px: .lobby-stage flex row; .director-panel left sidebar flex:0 0 15rem; .players-list-container flex:1 min-width:0; .lobby-stage #lobby-players grid repeat(auto-fill,minmax(140px,1fr)); #waiting-room.lobby-panel max-width:920px (id-anchored, beats every .lobby-panel rule ≥768, no collision with ≤767 100%)
- Mobile ≤767px: .lobby-stage block flow (grid then Director below); existing .lobby-panel{max-width:100%}@max-767 + #lobby-screen{overflow-y:auto}@max-767 → Add Bot reachable
- .entrance-card vertical seat tile (seat hue left edge + faint tint), .btn-kick corner, .bot-badge non-shrink retained; cardEntrance + @keyframes reused UNCHANGED; reduced-motion auto-covered by the existing global 06-states-anim.css block (no per-rule handling); no new timers/intervals
- NO pre-7.5 rule edited/reordered/removed: git diff shows changes ONLY at lines ≥729 (7.5 section) + EOF append; no hunk ≤728
- full npx jest green & additive (CSS-only, no test change); visual/responsive/reduced-motion eyeball user-side

**Verify:** cd C:/mm-phase7-5-1 && npx jest ; plus git -C C:/mm-phase7-5-1 diff public/css/02-hero-lobby.css shows every hunk at line ≥729 (no pre-7.5 rule touched)

**Steps:** Replace the two 7.5-own rules (#lobby-players li.entrance-card + .entrance-card__emoji, 765–777) with the vertical-tile form (flex-direction:column, position:relative, 4px seat-hue left edge + faint hsla tint over var(--bg-elevated), emoji 1.6rem) → append the PHASE 7.5.1 SEAT-TABLE LAYOUT subsection at EOF (.lobby-stage block default; .lobby-stage #lobby-players grid; .entrance-card .btn-kick absolute corner; @media (min-width:768px){ #waiting-room.lobby-panel max-width:920px; .lobby-stage flex gap:1.25rem; .director-panel flex:0 0 15rem margin-top:0; .players-list-container flex:1 min-width:0; #lobby-players margin-bottom:0 }) → verify git diff confined to ≥729 (no pre-7.5 edit) → full suite green & additive → branch-verify → commit. Visual/responsive/reduced-motion eyeball flagged user-side (jsdom never lays out).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/css/02-hero-lobby.css"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-5-1 && npx jest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Desktop ≥768px: .lobby-stage flex; .director-panel flex:0 0 15rem left sidebar; .lobby-stage #lobby-players grid repeat(auto-fill,minmax(140px,1fr)); #waiting-room.lobby-panel max-width:920px (cascade-safe id-anchor)", "Mobile ≤767px: .lobby-stage block (grid then Director); relies on existing .lobby-panel{max-width:100%}@max-767 + #lobby-screen{overflow-y:auto}@max-767 → Add Bot reachable", ".entrance-card vertical seat tile w/ distinct SEAT_HUES edge+tint; .btn-kick corner; .bot-badge non-shrink retained; cardEntrance + @keyframes reused UNCHANGED; reduced-motion via existing global block (no per-rule)", "NO pre-7.5 rule edited: git diff public/css/02-hero-lobby.css confined to lines ≥729 + EOF append; no hunk ≤728", "full npx jest green & additive over post-#31 baseline; zero pre-existing-suite regression; visual/responsive/reduced-motion eyeball user-side"]}
```
